name: omnicomrade
description: TechFitness - Sistema de gestión de gimnasio

scripts.build:
vite build && printf "const SUPABASE_URL = '%s'
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '%s'

const { createClient } = window.supabase; window.supabaseClient = createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);" "$SUPABASE_URL" "$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" > dist/js/supabase.js
